creative_brief.visual_style: Minimalist design with bold, eye-catching graphics and playful illustrations that enhance the eco-friendly, innovative, and approachable brand ethos.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Social media-centric campaigns focusing on engaging content and user-generated storytelling, combined with influencer partnerships to leverage credibility and reach.
creative_brief.typography_style: Bold, chunky hand-drawn fonts that convey a casual and approachable personality.

High in nutritional value with added vitamins

Widely recognized and trusted brand in plant-based category
creative_brief.product_highlight: Highlight the product's environmental impact, emphasizing OATLY's carbon footprint reduction and sustainable sourcing practices.
